output.formatted:
31

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(MIN(?appearances) AS ?lowest) WHERE {
  VALUES ?club {
    wd:Q524131 wd:Q619142
  }
  ?club wdt:P3270 ?appearances
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| lowest |
| ------ |
